product: Genie Code now supports auto-approve for tool actions
tagline: Genie Code now offers an auto approve mode that approves tool actions, like running code or editing notebooks, without prompting you for each request.
what_it_does: Genie Code now offers an auto approve mode that approves tool actions, like running code or editing notebooks, without prompting you for each request. An AI classifier reviews each action and blocks risky ones. Auto approve is a productivity feature, not a security boundary.
why_it_matters: Auto approve is a productivity feature, not a security boundary.
plain_summary: Genie Code now offers an auto approve mode that approves tool actions, like running code or editing notebooks, without prompting you for each request. An AI classifier reviews each action and blocks risky ones.
key_takeaway: Genie Code now offers an auto approve mode that approves tool actions, like running code or editing notebooks, without prompting you for each request.
